DP.203.0000:
Dexter: That’s it, folks!
All judging has been completed!\f
Which Pokémon will be crowned the
winner?\f
Let’s announce the results!\f
DP.203.0001:
First, the results of the Visual
Competition!\f
DP.203.0002:
Next, let’s have the results of the
Dance Competition!\f
DP.203.0003:
And finally, here are the results of
the Acting Competition!\f
DP.203.0004:
Dexter: The winner is...
Entry number [0132,0000]!\f
[0103,0001] and [0100,0002]!
Congratulations!\f
DP.203.0005:
And now, it’s time to announce the
results of the individual categories!\f
